omni.packages/p-00/project.omni.yaml:
# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/omni-oss/json-schemas/refs/heads/main/project.json
name: p-00
cache:
  key:
    files:
      - package.json
      - task.mjs
      - src/**/*.js
tasks:
  t0:
    exec: node ./task.mjs t0
    dependencies:
      - ^t0
    cache:
      output:
        files:
          - dist/t0.*
  t1:
    exec: node ./task.mjs t1
    dependencies:
      - t0
      - ^t1
    cache:
      output:
        files:
          - dist/t1.*
